---
title: "test_lightning_rod_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_lightning_rod_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.97
style_score: 3.58
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.73
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_optimize_file_signature, test_optimize_file_idempotent. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.lightning_rod](file://src.tools.lightning_rod)

### Exports
- `test_optimize_file_signature`
- `test_optimize_file_idempotent`
